Part.Source: Event Start txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WPGERAETIQUETAPRODUTO', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FilCod.Clear() &CollFilCod.Clear() DpFilialAcesso.call(&EmpCod, &PesCod, &sdtFilialAcesso) for &sdtFilialAcessoitem in &sdtFilialAcesso &FilCod.AddItem(&sdtFilialAcessoitem.PesFilAce, &sdtFilialAcessoitem.PesFilAceNom) &CollFilCod.Add(&sdtFilialAcessoitem.PesFilAce) EndFor &Filcod.Visible = &sdtFilialAcesso.Count > 1 &EmpImpCod.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, EmpImpCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod where EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.ETIQUETA or EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.ETIQUETA1 or EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.ETIQUETA2 or EmpImpTip = domTipoImpressora.ETIQUETA3 Where EmpImpFilCod.IsEmpty() or EmpImpFilCod.IsNull() or EmpImpFilCod in &CollFilCod &Mensagem = EmpImpPC.Trim() + '|'+ EmpImpNom.Trim() &EmpImpCod.AddItem(EmpImpCod,&Mensagem) when None &EmpImpCod.AddItem(0, 'Impressora etiquetas não cadastrada') EndFor &ProQtdEmb.Enabled = false &ProNroLot.enabled = False RetornaEmpresaModulo.Call(&EmpCod, ModuloSistema.IND_E, &IND_E) &EtiquetaCliente = false Do 'comboEtiqueta' Do 'Tabela' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ tbCor.Width = 200 UnnamedTable10.Width = 200 UnnamedTable9.Width = 200 UnnamedTable8.Width = 200 tbImagemModelo.Width = 250 tbImagemHtml.Width = 260 Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' &ProGraCod.Visible = False Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = Page.Rows &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PadObs = '' PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L','#EtiquetaCompra#',&Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,&PadObs,&PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') // vem do wwpedidocompra If &PadObs.Trim().IsEmpty() &EtqCod = trim(str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(str(&Context.FilCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) GravaProdutoEtiqueta.Call('DEL', &EtqCod, 0, '', &ProCod, &ProNom, &ProGraCod, &ProBar, '', &ProQtdEmb,&ProNroLot,&EtqQtd, &EtqProObsAdi) Else &EtqCod = &PadObs.Trim() PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G','#EtiquetaCompra#',&Context.PesCod,&Context.EmpCod,'',&PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'T') EndIf &ProGraCod = 1 &EtqQtd = 1 PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() &AuxTipoEtiqueta = val(trim(Substr(&PadObs,1,4))) &AuxLInha = val(Substr(&PadObs,5,4)) &auxColuna = val(Substr(&PadObs,9,4)) if &AuxLInha.IsEmpty() &AuxLInha = 1 EndIF If &AuxColuna.IsEmpty() &auxColuna = 1 EndIF &Linha = &AuxLInha &Coluna = &auxColuna EndIf &AuxImpTabColCod1 = val(Substr(&PadObs, 13, 1)) &AuxImpTabColCod2 = val(Substr(&PadObs, 14, 1)) if &AuxImpTabColCod1.IsEmpty() and &AuxImpTabColCod2.IsEmpty() &ImpTabColCod1 = 1 &ImpTabColCod2 = 0 Else &ImpTabColCod1 = &AuxImpTabColCod1 &ImpTabColCod2 = &AuxImpTabColCod2 Endif &TipoEtiqueta = &AuxTipoEtiqueta do 'dadosEtiqueta' do 'ValidaCampos' EndEvent Event Refresh txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar. //Code block: LoadWWPContext LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = grid.PageCount EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ //this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid &DeletarProduto = !'' &EtqProNom = trim(EtqProNom) If not EtqProGraNom.IsEmpty() &EtqProNom += ' | ' + EtqProGraNom EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoRemoverTudo' txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DVelop_ConfirmPanel_RemoverTudo.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DVelop_ConfirmPanel_RemoverTudo.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If DVelop_ConfirmPanel_RemoverTudo.Result = !'Yes' Do 'Do Action RemoverTudo' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoImprimir' Do CAse CAse &EmpImpCod.IsEmpty() msg('Impressora não selecionada!') Otherwise &TIpETqCod = &TipoEtiqueta prcGeraSolicitacaoImpressao.Call(&EmpCod, &Filcod, &EtqCod, &TIpETqCod, &CliPesCod, &ImpTabCod, &ImpTabColCod1, &ImpTabColCod2, &EmpImpCod, &Context.PesCod) &PadObs = padL(trim(&TipoEtiqueta.ToString()), 4, ' ') + padL(str(&Linha),4,'0') + padL(str(&Coluna),4,'0') &PadObs += trim(str(&ImpTabColCod1)) &PadObs += trim(str(&ImpTabColCod2)) PadraoUsuarioHora.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &EmpCod,&PadObs, &PadDtaMod, &PadDtaHorMod, 'P') txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 1 txtImpressaoEnviada.Caption = format('Impressão solicitada: %1, aguarde a impressão' + serverTime()) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoEtiquetasPedido' txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ EtiquetasPedido_Modal.Confirm() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EtiquetasPedido_Modal.OnLoadComponent /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WWPAux_WC.Object = wpEtiquetaPedido.Create(&EmpCod, &EtqCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event EtiquetasPedido_Modal.Close /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DowpModelosEtiqProDireta' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpModelosEtiqProDireta.PopUp() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoConf' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpTiposEtiquetas.Call() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'Do Action RemoverTudo' GravaProdutoEtiqueta.Call('DEL', &EtqCod, 0, '', &ProCod, &ProNom, &ProGraCod, &ProBar, '', &ProQtdEmb,&ProNroLot,&EtqQtd, &EtqProObsAdi) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode' txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ If not(&EtiquetaCliente = true) DVPanel_tbDadosPersonalizados_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_tbDadosPersonalizados_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf tbDescricaoEtiqueta.Visible = (&IND_E = 'S') tbdadosImpressao.Visible = (&sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL1 = true or &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL2 = true or &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_PES = true) TableLinhaCol.Visible = (&IsLinhaColuna = true) tbClientePersonalizado.Visible = (&sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_PES = true) TablePreco.Visible = (&sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL1 = true or &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL2 = true) tbColuna1.Visible = (&sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL1 = true) tbColuna2.Visible = (&sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_TAB_COL2 = true) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &EtqProNom.Click Produtos.Popup('RETURN', TrnMode.Update, &EmpCod, EtqProCod, '' ) EndEvent Event &CliPesCod.IsValid // do 'verificaClienteComImagem' RetornaNomePessoa.Call(&EmpCod, &CliPesCod, &CliPesRaz) EndEvent Event Enter &ProDesEtq1 = upper(&ProDesEtq1) &ProDesEtq2 = upper(&ProDesEtq2) &ProDesEtq3 = upper(&ProDesEtq3) &ProDesEtq4 = Upper(&ProDesEtq4) &ProCorNom = UPPER(&ProCorNom) &isOk = false if 1=2 //if (&TipoEtiqueta = 'R10' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'R19' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'R25' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'R10B') and &ProQtdEmb > 0 JDF tem que rever //ETIQUETA DE VOLUMES DA INDAGRIL, ONDE CADA VOLUME TEM UM CODIGO DE BARRAS. &ProNEwBar = '' VerificarIsExisteCodigoBarras.call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProQtdEmb, &ProNEwBar) if &ProNEwBar.IsEmpty() CriaCodigoBarrasProdutoVolume.call(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProQtdEmb, &ProNEwBar) Endif Else &ProNewBar = &ProBar Endif &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta.SetEmpty() if &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_PRO_MAISCOD = true //if &TipoEtiqueta = 'R19' JDF tem que rever do 'PegaCodigosAvulsos' Endif If &EtiquetaCliente <> true For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod,ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = &ProGraCod &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta = new() &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq1 = &ProDesEtq1 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq2 = &ProDesEtq2 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq3 = &ProDesEtq3 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq4 = &ProDesEtq4 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProCorNom = &ProCorNom &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta = &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta &EtqProObsAdi = &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ToJson() if ProDesEtq.IsEmpty() or ProDesEtq.IsNull() &ProNom = ProNom Else &ProNom = ProDesEtq Endif if &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_EST_LOT = true //&TipoEtiqueta = 'R26'//Vancollors //jdf tme que rever &ProNroLot = &EstLotCod EndIf GravaProdutoEtiqueta.Call('ADD', &EtqCod, 0, ProGraRef, ProCod, &ProNom, ProGraCod, &ProNewBar, ProGraNom, &ProQtdEmb,&ProNroLot,&EtqQtd, &EtqProObsAdi) &isOk = true When none msg('Produto não localizado') EndFor Else &isOk = true &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta = new() &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq1 = &ProDesEtq1 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq2 = &ProDesEtq2 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq3 = &ProDesEtq3 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProDesEtq4 = &ProDesEtq4 &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ProCorNom = &ProCorNom &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta = &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta &EtqProObsAdi = &sdtDadosAdicionaisEtiqueta.ToJson() if &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_EST_LOT = true //&TipoEtiqueta = 'R26'//Vancollors jdf tem que rever &ProNroLot = &EstLotCod EndIf GravaProdutoEtiqueta.Call('ADD', &EtqCod, 0, &NovoProCod, &ProCod, &NovoProNom, 1, &NovoProBar, '', &ProQtdEmb,&ProNroLot,&EtqQtd, &EtqProObsAdi) EndiF if &isOk = true &ProDesEtq1.SetEmpty() &ProDesEtq2.SetEmpty() &ProDesEtq3.SetEmpty() &ProDesEtq4.SetEmpty() &ProCorNom.SetEmpty() &ProCod.SetEmpty() &ProRef.SetEmpty() // &AuxProCod.SetEmpty() &ProBar.SetEmpty() &EstLotCod.SetEmpty() &ProNom.SetEmpty() &NovoProCod.SetEmpty() &NovoProNom.SetEmpty() &ProQtdEmb.SetEmpty() &NovoProBar.SetEmpty() //&ProNroLot.SetEmpty() grid.Refresh() EndIF &ProRef.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &EtiquetaCliente.Click Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event &EtiquetaCliente.IsValid Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndEvent Event 'f4' 4 PromptProdutoGradeRef.Popup(&EmpCod, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProRef) &ProRef.SetFocus() txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 EndEvent Event &ProRef.IsValid txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 RetornaProdutoReferencia_2.Call(&EmpCod, &ProRef, &ProCod, &ProGraCod, &ProNom, &IsAchouProduto, &ProReqVlr, &ProReqQtd, &ProBarQtd, &ProBarTip, &ErroMensagem) do 'LoadProduto' EndEvent Event &DeletarProduto.Click GravaProdutoEtiqueta.Call('DEL', EtqCod, EtqItmCod, '', &ProCod, &ProNom, &ProGraCod, &ProBar, '', &ProQtdEmb,&ProNroLot, &EtqQtd, &EtqProObsAdi) grid.Refresh() txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 &ProRef.SetFocus() EndEvent Event &TipoEtiqueta.ControlValueChanged txtImpressaoEnviada.Visible = 0 do 'dadosEtiqueta' do 'ValidaCampos' EndEvent Sub 'dadosEtiqueta' &TIpETqCod = &TipoEtiqueta prcRetornaPErsonalizacao.Call(&EmpCod, &TIpETqCod, &sdtConfigEtiqueta) if &sdtConfigEtiqueta.TipEtqPadImpCod > 0 &EmpImpCod = &sdtConfigEtiqueta.TipEtqPadImpCod Endif if &sdtConfigEtiqueta.ImagemBase64.IsEmpty() tbImagemModelo.Visible = 1 tbImagemHtml.Visible = 0 &Varchar = 'EtiqPro'+&sdtConfigEtiqueta.TipEtqModBas &ModeloBaseImagem.FromImage(&Varchar) Else tbImagemHtml.Visible = 1 tbImagemModelo.Visible = 0 imagehtml.Caption = Format(!"", &sdtConfigEtiqueta.ImagemBase64) Endif do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndSub Sub 'pegaCodigosAvulsos' For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, ProBarRef Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = 1 Where ProBarTip = 'A' Or ProBarTip = 'O' //SOMENTE OS AVULSOS OU ORIGINAIS if not &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta.IsEmpty() &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta += ', ' Endif &CodigosExtrasImpressaoEtiqueta += trim(ProBarRef) EndFor EndSub Sub 'comboEtiqueta' &TipoEtiqueta.Clear() For Each ORder EmpCod, TipEtqCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TipEtqModTip = 'P' //ETIQUETA DE PRODUTOS Where TipEtqSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO &DescricaoVarchar = format('[%1] %2 | %3 Col. | %4 ', TipEtqModBas.Trim(), TipEtqForm.EnumerationDescription(), trim(Str(TipEtQtdCol)), TipEtqNom) &TipoEtiqueta.AddItem(TipEtqCod, &DescricaoVarchar) EndFor do 'dadosEtiqueta' EndSub Sub 'ValidaCampos' // &AuxLInha = &Linha // &auxColuna = &Coluna // &IsLinhaColuna = false tbcor.Visible = &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_PRO_CORNOM &ProQtdEmb.Enabled = &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_PRO_QTDEMB &ProNroLot.Enabled = &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_EST_LOTAV TableLoteEstoque.Visible = &sdtConfigEtiqueta.IsSolicita_EST_LOT // &IsConfigPreco = iif(&TipoEtiqueta in ('R08','R09', 'R15', 'R18', 'R29'), true, false) // &ImpTabColCod2.Visible = iif(&TipoEtiqueta in ('R10B', 'R12', 'P04', 'P07', 'P08', 'P09'), true, false) // Do Case // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'R01' // &ColunaMaxima = 1 // &LinhaMaxima = 1 // &IsLinhaColuna = false // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'R20' // &ColunaMaxima = 1 // &LinhaMaxima = 1 // &IsLinhaColuna = false // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'R10' OR &TipoEtiqueta = 'R10B' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'R19' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'R25' // // If &TipoEtiqueta = 'R10B' // &IsConfigPreco = true // &ImpTabColCod2.Visible = false // EndIf // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'R12' // &IsConfigPreco = true // &NaoMostrarNome.Visible = false // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P01' // &ColunaMaxima = 2 // &LinhaMaxima = 11 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P02' // &ColunaMaxima = 3 // &LinhaMaxima = 9 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P03' // &ColunaMaxima = 3 // &LinhaMaxima = 9 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P04' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'P07' or &TipoEtiqueta = 'P09' // &ColunaMaxima = 5 // &LinhaMaxima = 13 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // &IsConfigPreco = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P05' // &ColunaMaxima = 2 // &LinhaMaxima = 13 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // //&IsConfigPreco = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P06' // &ColunaMaxima = 5 // &LinhaMaxima = 13 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta.IsEmpty() // &IsLinhaColuna = true // // Case &TipoEtiqueta = 'P08' // &ColunaMaxima = 7 // &LinhaMaxima = 18 // &IsLinhaColuna = true // &IsConfigPreco = true // &ImpTabColCod2.Visible = false // // EndCase // // // &Coluna.Clear() // For &Count = 1 to &ColunaMaxima // &Coluna.AddItem(&Count, trim(str(&Count))) // EndFor // // &Linha.Clear() // For &Count = 1 to &LinhaMaxima // &Linha.AddItem(&Count, trim(str(&Count))) // EndFor // // if &Linha.Count >= &AuxLInha // &Linha = &AuxLInha // EndIF // // If &Coluna.Count >= &auxColuna // &Coluna = &auxColuna // EndIF Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndSub Sub 'LoadProduto' &ProBar = '' &NovoProBar = '' &ProNewBar = '' &IsExiste = false &ProQtdEmb.SetEmpty() For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &ProCod if &ProBarTip in ('C', 'E','O') //Codigo Informado é de um caixa/Etiqueta &ProBar = &ProRef &ProQtdEmb = &ProBarQtd Else &ProBar = ProBar &ProQtdEmb = ProQtdEmb Endif &IsExiste = true &NovoProCod = trim(ProRef) &NovoProBar = trim(ProBar) if not ProDesEtq.IsEmpty() and not ProDesEtq.IsNull() &NovoProNom = trim(ProDesEtq) &ProNom = trim(ProDesEtq) Else &NovoProNom = trim(&ProNom) EndIf &ProDesEtq1 = ProDesEtq1 &ProDesEtq2 = ProDesEtq2 &ProDesEtq3 = ProDesEtq3 &ProCorNom = ProCorNom Exit When None If &ProCod <> 0 &ProNom = 'PRODUTO NÃO LOCALIZADO!' msg(&ProNom) Else &ProNom = '<-- INFORME O PRODUTO' EndIF EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where ProCod = &ProCod Where ProGraCod = 1 &ProDesEtq4 = EstLoc &EstLotCod.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, ProCod, ProGraCod Where EstLotQtd > 0 &AUXEstLotCod = EstLotCod +' -'+retiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Udp(toformattedString(EstLotQtd)) &EstLotCod.AddItem(EstLotCod,&AUXEstLotCod) EndFor Exit EndFor EndSub Sub 'Tabela' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &Filcod &ImpTabCod = FilTabCod Exit EndFor For Each Order EmpCod, TabCod, TabColCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where TabCod = &ImpTabCod &ImpTabColCod1.AddItem(TabColCod,TabColNom) &ImpTabColCod2.AddItem(TabColCod,TabColNom) EndFor EndSub
